title: Automated Medical Document Synthesis
summary: A full-stack web app that turns structured clinic data into consult letters while keeping sensitive data inside the secure environment.

title: Retractable Cane Stabilizer
summary: A 3D-printed attachment that keeps a cane upright without changing normal walking ergonomics.

title: Student Number Finite State Machine
summary: A 4-bit FSM that drives a 7-segment display through a repeated digit sequence using JK flip-flops and NAND logic.

title: Airport Sorting System
summary: A simulated luggage transport and sorting system combining Python routing, a robotic arm, and a custom bridge mechanism.

title: Passive Geometric Cable Holder
summary: A static rectangular spiral cable holder securing wires through natural geometry and rigidity without material fatigue.

title: Portable Pocket Cane Holder
summary: A collapsible mobility-aid C-frame table clamp with a variable fulcrum and detent locking system.

title: Nutcracker
summary: A custom mechanical tool designed to securely hold hazelnuts in place for easy breaking.

title: Cabinet Design
summary: A parametric cabinet assembly design prepared in Autodesk Inventor.

title: Compliant Table Cane Holder
summary: A table-edge clip utilizing compliant mechanism design to secure a cane.

title: Wireless Charging Cradle
summary: A custom wireless charging cradle optimized for specific phone and charger geometry.

title: Dry Erase Marker Holder
summary: A simple 3D-printed storage and organizer tray for dry erase markers.
